lock.subtitleRestoring: Restoring your session locally with the cached passphrase
lock.subtitleLocked: Enter your passphrase to decrypt your private key locally
lock.spinnerRestoring: Restoring your session with the cached passphrase…
lock.spinnerUnlocking: Decrypting your local private key with the passphrase…
lock.note: The passphrase is used for local decryption only and is never uploaded

errors.noStoredKey: No stored private key to unlock. Please log in again.
errors.readStoredKey: Failed to read stored private key.
errors.keyNotProtected: Your stored key is not passphrase-protected. For your security, please log in again with a passphrase-protected key.
errors.incorrectPassphrase: Incorrect passphrase. Could not unlock your key.
errors.vaultLocked: Vault is locked. Unlock with your passphrase to decrypt.
errors.noRecipientKey: No recipient public key provided for encryption.
errors.ownPublicKeyUnavailable: Your own public key is unavailable. Unlock your vault before creating a secret.
errors.decryptPrivateKey: Failed to decrypt private key. Incorrect passphrase?

errors.loadFailed: Failed to load the shared metadata key.
errors.blobMalformed: The shared metadata private key blob is malformed.
errors.requiresPassphrase: The shared metadata private key requires a passphrase we do not have.
errors.fingerprintMismatchDeclared: Shared metadata private key fingerprint mismatch: the recovered key does not match its declared fingerprint; refusing to trust it.
errors.fingerprintMismatchActive: Shared metadata private key fingerprint mismatch: the recovered key does not match the active metadata key record; refusing to trust it.
errors.keyUnavailable: The shared metadata key is unavailable. Unlock your vault and ensure a metadata key is configured.
errors.noUsableKey: No usable shared metadata key is available to encrypt with.
